title: Token Standard
summary: ERC-20 defines a standard interface for fungible tokens, including token transfers, delegated transfers, allowances, and transfer/approval events.

security_properties.name: Transfer authorization
security_properties.description: Only a token holder can transfer its own tokens.

security_properties.name: Allowance bounded spending
security_properties.description: A spender cannot transfer more than the approved allowance.

security_properties.name: Accounting integrity
security_properties.description: Transfers preserve balance and total-supply invariants.
